description: Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile! A beautifully minimalist mathematical puzzle game that tests your strategic thinking and grid planning skills.
instructions: Use your Arrow keys to move the tiles. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one!

title: Hextris
description: A fast-paced hexagonal block puzzle inspired by Tetris. Rotate the hexagon to match colored blocks before the screen fills up.
instructions: Use Left and Right Arrow keys (or click/tap on screen edges) to rotate the hexagon. Stack blocks of the same color to remove them.

title: Google Pacman Doodle
description: Play the classic original Google Pac-Man Doodle game. Navigate through the neon-blue maze, eat yellow dots, and avoid the colorful ghosts!
instructions: Use your Arrow keys to steer Pac-Man. Eat power pellets to make ghosts vulnerable and edible for bonus points.

title: Flappy Bird
description: The viral sensation Flappy Bird reborn! Tap to flap your wings and navigate safely through a series of green tubes without crashing.
instructions: Press the Spacebar, Arrow Up, or Click to flap the bird's wings. Time your jumps carefully to navigate through the pipe gaps.

title: Doodle Jump Clone
description: Bounce endlessly onto wooden platforms, avoiding black holes, monsters, and breaking platforms as you aim for the stratosphere.
instructions: Use the Left and Right Arrow keys (or move mouse cursor) to guide the character side to side. Shoot or jump over threats.

title: Minesweeper
description: Expose all the safe squares in a grid without detonating any of the hidden mines. Rely on logic and numerical clues to clear the field.
instructions: Left-click (tap) to reveal a tile. Right-click to flag a tile that you suspect contains a hidden landmine.

title: React Tetris
description: Classic Russian brick puzzle featuring the iconic falling tetromino blocks. Clear lines to gain score multiplier bonuses.
instructions: Use Left/Right Arrow keys to move, Up Arrow key to rotate, Down Arrow key for slow fall, and Spacebar for hard drop.

title: Astray 3D Maze
description: A stylish, retro WebGL-powered 3D labyrinth ball game. Navigate your ball to the exit portal of increasingly complex floating mazes.
instructions: Use W/A/S/D or Arrow keys to steer and control the rolling ball. Press Space to jump over obstacles and slide through blocks.
